description: The BrowserCreateDirectoryDialogue component is used mainly in the inventory screen when creating a new directory in the inventory.

fields._callback: A sync delegate to call when the Create Folder dialogue is confirmed.
fields._text: The text for the Create Directory dialouge box.
fields._textField: The text field that is the name of the new directory.

methods.Create: Handles creating a directory in the current directory.

notes.title: CreateHandler
notes.text: A sync delegate that takes a name and an "out string message" and modifies the message coming in. Returns a boolean.
